english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: First, we look at what the person has said and what they have not said. Then we ask the person to tell us more about the parts that are not shown. We watch for any part that is not spoken about or that is kept from view. We think about why it might be kept from view and we try to find those parts that could help us understand the whole picture. Next, we watch the things the person does and we look at the way they act and we note any thing that is not said, because a change in what they do can show a part that is not spoken. Then we talk to other people who know the person, because they may have seen things that the person did not tell us. After that we put together all the things we have found, seen, and we think about how they fit together. This gives us a picture of the whole thing that was hidden in the story. Finally we check if the picture makes sense with what we already know and if it does we have found the parts that were not shown at first.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person

Each time you do it, you are training your mind and your body to act in that way. It is like when you move your body to get strong. The step after the third step is when we see that doing the same good thing again and again makes it easier to do it the next time. The step after that is when we see that these many small acts build a way of being that stays with you. The step after that is when we see that when this way of being is inside you, it is no longer just something you do, but it is who you are. Finally, we see that a person who does good things all the time is what we call a good person because their many small acts have made the whole person good.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
Before you do something, you must think about how another person will act when they see what you did. This is a way to see into the future by looking at how people think.

First, you must look at the thing you want to do. Think about what this thing is. Once you know it, you must look at the other person. You must ask yourself what they want. What makes them happy? What makes them sad? What do they need? You must try to see the world through their eyes.

Second, you must think about how your thing will change their world. If you do something, it will push them. It might push them, or it might make them happy, or it might make them angry. You must see the way your thing and their thing will move together.

Third, you must think about what they will think about your thing. This is a very important part. You must try to see the world through their eyes. Do not think about what you want. Think about what they think about what you want. If you do something that makes them think you are trying to hurt them, they will do something to keep themselves safe. If you do something that helps them, they will do something to help you.

The thing after the third thing, you must put all these thoughts together to make a guess.

english_query: how the way choices are shown can change what you pick
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person makes a choice between two or more things. We think we pick the best thing by looking at what we like. Then, we see that the way these things are put in front of us can change what we pick. For one way to see this, if we show a person two things and say one is good and one is bad, they will pick the good one. But if we change how we say it, such as saying one is not bad and one is good, the person might change their mind. Another way this happens is when we show a person a choice between two things. If we say one thing is good and the other thing is bad, the person will pick the good one. This happens because the way we put things in a line changes how the mind sees how much each thing is good for. We can also see this when we show how much we might lose. If we tell a person they will lose something, they will feel a lot of fear. If we tell them they will get something, they will feel a lot of hope. This means the way we show the choices is a way to move the person to pick one thing over another. In the end, we see that the way we show the choices is just as important as the choices themselves.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
Imagine you are trying to find the best way to build a house. You want the house to be the best house that has ever been seen. You want the walls to be very strong and the roof to be very beautiful. You spend all your time and all your money to make it the best. But while you are working, the sun goes down and the rain comes and you have no place to sleep. You have no place to stay warm.

This is the thing we must think about. Sometimes, we want to find the very best way to do something. We want the answer that is the most right and the most perfect. But finding that one perfect answer can take a very long time. It can take so much time that the world changes. It can take so much of what we have that we have nothing left to do anything else.

The hard question is this. When is it better to stop looking for the best way and just pick a way that works well enough?

Some people will say we must always find the best way. They think that if we do not find the best way, we are doing a bad job. They think that if we stop too soon, we will be sorry later. They believe that the best way is always good enough to wait for. They want to be sure that everything is as good as it can be.

english_query: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
ugf_response:
When two or more people come together to make a plan to get something they want, they are making a promise. This promise is a way for them to act so that everyone gets what they want. Sometimes these promises work for a long time, and sometimes they break very quickly. To understand why, we must look at how the people think and how they act.

First, we must look at what each person gets from the promise. If one person gets much more than the other, the person who gets less might feel it is not good. They might think it is better to stop the promise and do something else. If the things they get are not enough to make them happy, the promise will probably break. a good promise is one where both sides feel they are getting something that is as good as what they are giving away.

Second, we must look at what people think will happen in the future. If a person thinks they can get a better promise with someone else later, they might leave the promise they have now. If they think the other person will break the promise, they will keep the promise to keep themselves safe. a good promise is one where the things given are what people think is right and the things given are what people think is right.

Third, we must look at how much people trust each other. Trust is the feeling that the other person will do what they said they would

english_query: the problem of hurting one person to help many

To save these many people, you must do something that will hurt one person who is not in a state where they might die. This is a very hard thing to think about.

First, we look at the side that wants to save the many. This way of thinking says that the best thing to do is the thing that makes the most people happy or keeps the most people alive. If you save ten people by hurting one person, this way of thinking says you have done a good thing because ten is more than one. It looks at the whole way that good things add up in the world.

Second, we look at the side that wants to keep the one person safe. This way of thinking says that every person is important. It says that it is wrong to hurt a person even if it helps others. It says that you cannot use a person like a thing to get what you want. If you hurt someone who did nothing wrong, you have done a bad thing. It does not matter if it helps many people. The act of hurting is wrong in itself.

english_query: how paying close attention to what someone needs is a kind of good
ugf_response:
When we look at how people live together, we often ask what makes a thing done by a person good. One way to see this is to look at what people need to be well. Every person has things they must have to live a good life. Some of these things are simple, like food or a place to sleep. Other things are more about how they feel inside, like being loved or being seen by others.

If you look with much care at what another person needs, you are doing something very important. You are not just thinking about yourself. You are seeing the things that other people need to be happy and to be whole. When you see these needs, you can act in a way that helps them. If you see that a person wants to eat and you give them food, you have changed their world from a bad place to a good place.

This way of acting is a kind of good because it makes the world better for everyone. It means that the things people must have are met. If a person wants to eat and you give them food, the world is a better place because people feel less alone. If a person feels that no one is with them, the world is a worse place.

Some people think that being good is just about following a set of things you must do. But being good can also come from how you look at the world.
